summary.narrative: Stimpson campaigned on 'One Mobile' platform emphasizing safety, business-friendly policies, and family-oriented development. Served 12 years across three terms, achieving fiscal improvements and infrastructure upgrades while opposing environmental protections despite pollution concerns.
summary.grade_rationale: Delivered on fiscal/infrastructure goals but limited environmental action despite pledges; some initiatives achieved, others incomplete or blocked.

promises.normalized: Improve city financial strength and reduce debt
Expand city infrastructure and parks improvements
Address environmental protection and pollution concerns

data_gaps: Specific campaign platform details and written promises from 2013, 2017, 2021 elections
Quantified metrics for downtown development and job creation claims
Details on Map for Mobile initiative scope and outcomes
Supplier diversity program specifics and measurable results
Environmental opposition reasoning and supporting documentation
Credit rating increase details and timeline
Annexation impact analysis and resident growth attribution
Police and fire compensation increase percentages and dates
